# MuleSoft VM Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.0) of VM Connector documentation.
> See [VM Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the VM Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [VM Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Aggregate Messages Pending in Queue with VM Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-aggregate-messages.md)
- [Troubleshooting VM Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [VM Connector Dynamic Routing Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-dynamic-routing.md)
- [VM Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-examples.md)
- [VM Connector Propagate Message Attributes Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-propagate-messages.md)
- [VM Connector Send Messages across Different Apps Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-publish-across-apps.md)
- [VM Connector Publish and Listen to Messages Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-publish-listen.md)
- [VM Connector Publish Messages and Get a Response Back Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-publish-response.md)
- [VM Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure VM Connector 2.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-studio-configuration.md)
- [VM Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/vm-connector/latest/vm-xml-maven.md)
